title: Bookmark save returns 500 when URL has no scheme
body: Saving a bookmark like example.org/article (no http/https) panics in the URL normalizer. We should prepend https:// before parsing instead of calling url.Parse directly.

title: Add full-text search across saved articles
body: Right now search is a naive ILIKE. I want Postgres tsvector with a GIN index and a weighted ts_rank over title + extracted body. Algolia is overkill for self-hosters.

title: PR: add tsvector full-text search
body: Implements #143. Adds a search_vector generated column, GIN index, migration, and a /api/search endpoint with ts_rank ordering.

title: Reader view strips code blocks from dev articles
body: The Readability extraction drops <pre><code> blocks on a bunch of dev blogs. Probably the sanitizer allowlist. Repro: save a Go blog post, open reader view, code is gone.

title: Bump golang.org/x/net from 0.27.0 to 0.31.0
body: Bumps golang.org/x/net from 0.27.0 to 0.31.0. Release notes and changelog linked. Addresses CVE in HTTP/2 handling.

title: Stripe webhook signature verification fails intermittently
body: A few checkout.session.completed events fail signature check. I think the raw body is being mutated by a middleware before it reaches the verifier. Need to read the body before any JSON binding.

title: PR: read raw body before binding for Stripe webhook
body: Fixes #147. Buffers the request body once, verifies the Stripe signature against the raw bytes, then re-decodes. Adds a regression test.

title: Uptime checks block on slow targets and stall the scheduler
body: When one monitored host is slow, the whole check loop backs up. Each check should run in its own goroutine with a context timeout instead of sequentially.

title: PR: concurrent checks with per-target timeouts
body: Fixes #61. Fan-out checks via a bounded worker pool, each with a 5s context timeout. Adds a flaky-target integration test.

title: Add Prometheus /metrics endpoint
body: Would like to scrape glanceboard from my homelab Prometheus. Expose check latency, up/down gauge per target, and scheduler queue depth.

title: Flux reconcile drift on sealed-secrets after cluster reboot
body: After a node reboot the sealed-secrets controller comes up before the CRDs, so Flux reports persistent drift until I re-trigger reconciliation. Need a dependsOn / healthcheck ordering.

title: Pin Traefik chart version and document upgrade steps
body: An unpinned Traefik chart pulled a breaking v3 change and took down ingress for an evening. Pin the version and add an upgrade runbook.

title: Backoff helper can overflow on high attempt counts
body: The exponential backoff shifts 1 << attempt and overflows int64 past attempt 63, returning a negative duration. Cap the exponent and clamp to maxDelay.

title: PR: clamp backoff exponent and add jitter option
body: Fixes #18. Caps the shift at 62, clamps to maxDelay, and adds optional full-jitter. Table tests cover the overflow boundary.

title: Install script clobbers existing .zshrc without backup
body: Running install.sh on a machine that already has a .zshrc overwrites it. Should move the existing file to .zshrc.bak first.

title: Log replication stalls when a follower restarts mid-term
body: After a follower restarts, the leader keeps sending from nextIndex but never decrements on the conflict reply, so replication wedges. I think prevLogTerm matching is off by one.

title: Add snapshotting so the log doesn't grow unbounded
body: No log compaction yet. Need InstallSnapshot RPC and to truncate the log after a snapshot. Parking this for now, leader election + basic replication first.
assignee: Jake game night Thursday — Overwatch or Rocket League?

title: Redis backend leaks connections under burst load
body: The Redis-backed limiter opens a new client per request instead of reusing a pool. Connections pile up fast. Half-finished the pooled version on a branch.

title: Sliding-window counter drops requests at window boundary
body: Right at the window rollover a burst slips through because the previous window weight isn't applied. Needs the weighted previous-window formula.

title: Forecast cache never expires, shows stale data
body: The on-disk cache has no TTL so cli-weather keeps printing yesterday's forecast. Was going to wire in go-lru-cache with a TTL but never finished.

title: PR: support reading API token from env var
body: Adds RIDGELINE_TOKEN env fallback so you don't have to pass --token every call. Config file still wins if both are set.

title: Bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.8.0 to 1.8.1
body: Bumps github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.8.0 to 1.8.1. Release notes linked.

title: Down migrations run in wrong order on rollback
body: Rolling back more than one step applies the down files ascending instead of descending, so dependent tables fail to drop. Need to reverse the slice before applying.

title: PR: add lifecycle rule to expire snapshots after 30 days
body: Adds a configurable retention window and applies an S3 lifecycle rule so old snapshots get cleaned up automatically. Defaults to 30 days.

title: Graceful shutdown deadlocks if Submit is called after Close
body: Calling Submit after Close blocks forever instead of returning an error. Should select on a done channel and return ErrPoolClosed.

title: PR: fix URL normalizer to prepend https scheme
body: Fixes #142. Prepends https:// when a saved URL has no scheme before calling url.Parse, with a fallback for already-absolute URLs. Adds table tests.

title: PR: allow code blocks through reader-view sanitizer
body: Fixes #145. Adds pre, code and the language-* class allowlist to the sanitizer policy so fenced code survives reader view. Snapshot tests added.

title: PR: expose Prometheus metrics endpoint
body: Implements #63. Adds /metrics with per-target up gauge, check latency histogram, and scheduler queue depth. Registers the default Go collectors too.

title: Bump go from 1.22 to 1.23 in CI
body: Updates the Go toolchain and the GitHub Actions setup-go matrix from 1.22 to 1.23.

title: PR: pin Traefik chart and add upgrade runbook
body: Fixes #32. Pins the Traefik Helm chart to a known-good version and adds docs/traefik-upgrade.md with rollback steps.

title: PR: order sealed-secrets after CRDs with dependsOn
body: Addresses #31. Adds a Flux dependsOn so the sealed-secrets HelmRelease waits on the CRD kustomization, plus a health check. Still reproducing the reboot case.

title: PR: back up existing dotfiles before install
body: Fixes #7. install.sh now moves any existing target to .bak before symlinking, and prints what it backed up.

title: PR: reverse down migrations on multi-step rollback
body: Fixes #8. Sorts down migrations descending before applying so rollbacks unwind in the correct order. Adds a two-step rollback test.

title: Bump github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2 from 1.30.0 to 1.32.0
body: Bumps github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2 from 1.30.0 to 1.32.0. Changelog linked.

title: PR: return ErrPoolClosed instead of deadlocking on Submit
body: Fixes #4. Submit now selects on the pool's done channel and returns ErrPoolClosed once Close has been called. Adds a race-detector test.

title: PR: add TTL expiry and background janitor
body: Adds per-entry TTL and an optional janitor goroutine that evicts expired entries. Originally for cli-weather's stale forecast bug.

title: PR: add tm open to launch a bookmark in the browser
body: Adds a tm open <id> subcommand that resolves the bookmark URL and opens it with the OS default browser. Cross-platform via a small exec helper.

title: PR: fix prevLogTerm off-by-one in AppendEntries
body: Addresses #14. Corrects the prevLogTerm/prevLogIndex consistency check and decrements nextIndex on a conflict reply so a restarted follower can catch up. Still flaky under fast restarts.
